summary: The user is training for a sprint triathlon on November 1st and seeks advice on improving running endurance and incorporating strength training and swimming drills into their routine. They decide to replace squats and lunges with glute bridges and step-downs, add Russian twists, and include swimming drills focused on endurance and efficiency.
facts: The user is training for a sprint triathlon on November 1st. The user completed a 5K event three weeks prior to the session. The user plans to replace squats and lunges with glute bridges and step-downs in their strength training routine. The user will add Russian twists to their strength training routine. The user intends to incorporate swimming drills to improve swimming endurance for the triathlon. The user will start with shorter swimming distances and gradually increase them as they build endurance. The user is focusing on technique and mixing up their swimming drills. The user is incorporating strength training exercises to target their upper body.
